## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, etc.)
- [ ] Branch name follows policy (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, etc.)
- [ ] New/updated code is covered by tests (or justification provided)
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior/config/API changed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
